fields.label: Scoold URL
fields.helpText: This is the URL to your Scoold server, e.g. `https://qna.scoold.com`. Remove `/` from the end of the URL.

fields.label: Scoold API key
fields.helpText: Go to the [Administration page](https://scoold/admin) of Scoold to get an API key.

display.label: New Question
display.description: Triggers when a new question is created.
Triggers when a new answer is created.
display.label: New Answer

inputFields.label: Author
inputFields.helpText: The `id` of the user who created this question. Defaults to the System account.

inputFields.label: Space
inputFields.helpText: The name of the space where this question is going to be posted.

display.label: Create Question
display.description: Creates a new Question on Scoold

inputFields.label: Full-text search query
inputFields.helpText: You can use Lucene query syntax here.

inputFields.label: Post Type
inputFields.helpText: Specify the type of content to search for, e.g. "question", "comment", "reply".
